chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1944 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.12.2025 Mr. Sajjad Ahmed Chandio, advocate for petitioner Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G Sindh a/w DSP Kotri Shah Nawaz and SIP Faheem Hussain *** On the last date of hearing SSP Jamshoro was directed to take hectic efforts for the arrest of nominated accused persons in Crime No.208 of 2025 registered at P.S Jamshoro for offences under Sections 320, 322, 337-G, 279 and 427 PPC. Today DSP Kotri is present on behalf of SSP Jamshoro and states that one accused and subject vehicle have been detained while efforts are being made for the arrest of driver. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of the petition. In view of the above this petition is disposed of with directions to SSP Jamshoro to take all possible efforts for the arrest of absconding accused persons in above crime and such effort include but not limited to blockage of their CNICs and as soon as they are arrested, they shall be produced before the competent Court to face the trial. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
